version_description: Includes chords and keyboard melodies arranged for guitar.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
The Weeknd
"Heartless"

Standard tuning. Capo 4th fret.

[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
e|2----0----0----|
B|3----0----2----|
G|2----0----2----|
D|4----0----2----|
A|2----2----0----|
E|-----3---------|[/tab]


[tab][Intro]
  [ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
e|------------7---|------------5---|------------7---|----------------|
B|7---------------|5---------------|7---------------|5---------------|
G|----------------|----------------|----------------|--------7-------|
D|----------------|----------------|----------------|----------------| x 2
A|----------------|----------------|----------------|----------------|
E|----------------|----------------|----------------|----------------|[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                    [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   I shouldn't rush it[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                           [ch]G6[/ch]
   Never need a bitch, I'm what a bitch need (bitch need)[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]A[/ch]
   Tryna find the one that can fix me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
   I've been dodgin' death in the six speed[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm7[/ch]
   Amphetamine got my stummy feelin' sickly[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
   Yeah, I want it all now[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
   I've been runnin' through the pussy, need a dog pound[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
   Hundred models gettin' faded in the compound[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
   Tryna love me but they never get a pulse down[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
   Why, 'cause I'm heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
   And I'm back to my ways 'cause I'm heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
   All this money and this pain got me heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
   Low life for life 'cause I'm heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]G6[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
   Tryna be a better man, but I'm heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
   Never be a weddin' plan for the heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
   Low life for life 'cause I'm heartless[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
   Said I'm heartless[/tab]
[tab][ch]G6[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
   So much pussy, it be fallin' out the pocket[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]G6[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                             [ch]G6[/ch]

[tab]                                          [ch]A[/ch]
   I'm talkin' Time, Rolling Stone, and Bazaar now ('zaar)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                                                     [ch]G6[/ch]
   Sellin' dreams to these girls with their guard down (what?)[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]A[/ch]
   Seven years, I've been swimmin' with the sharks now[/tab]

[tab][ch]G6[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
